message:
chore: sync beads issue tracker and audit index

Routine sync of the beads issue database (.beads/issues.jsonl)
reflecting concurrent multi-agent session updates, and 15 new
entries in audit_index.jsonl covering io/{buf_writer, buf_reader,
copy, split, stream_adapters, read_line, lines}.rs and
sync/{barrier, rwlock, pool}.rs plus 5 additional files audited
by agent yolo at commit 60e9bcda.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
